name: AKM Daulatuzzaman Khan Hridoy Orthi
bio: University colleague from Apparel Manufacturing program. Been part of my daily life for 3 years. Constant supportive presence.

name: Ibrahim Khalilullah Niloy
bio: University friend who was my travel buddy. Been integral part of my daily life for 3 years. Always there with wise counsel and amazing travel stories.

name: Rafiuzzaman Rafi
bio: University friend from Apparel Manufacturing. Been part of my daily life for 3 years. Talented UI/UX designer with creative vision. Need to reconnect soon.

name: Shakil Khan
bio: College friend who has been integral part of my daily life for 10 years. Always there for emotional support and good times together.

name: Shakhawat Hossain Srishty
bio: Football buddy who plays with me, Shakshor on Saturday evenings. Flutter developer who discusses tech challenges. Together we brainstorm, gossip about AI invasion impact on our careers.

name: Shahariar Ritul
bio: Colleague turned close friend. Play football on Saturday evenings with me and Srishty. Left same industry after 2 months, took 3 months self-learning, got into Akij iBros through referral. Now at Brac IT (higher salary, security). My torch bearer to break into tech.

name: Rafat Bin Islam Tamim
bio: Programming Hero student who couldn't finish but took Coursera route. Got job through referral and now working at Akij iBros (renowned company). My mentor in philosophical discussions about AI invasion impact. Deeply affected by recent AI changes. Also friend of Ritul.

name: Tanzimul Reshat Dipto
bio: Childhood friend from school. We played together growing up. Now project partner and music lover. Love jamming and brainstorming together. Also friend of Tamim and Ritul.

name: MD Farhan Sadik
bio: Known as Tanam. 2-3 years older. Met online at COC (Cloud Online Coding) 10 years ago, never met in person but as close as it gets. Currently doing Programming Hero level-1 course together. Supporting each other through the learning journey.

name: Mohebul Hassan
bio: Was supposed to start Programming Hero course with me but jumped to level-2 after 2-3 months. Ahead in the learning journey. Great learner and very motivated. Bright future ahead in tech.

name: Aminul Islam Fahim
bio: Cyber security friend who suggested me to explore SQA career path. Also a good friend of my spouse. Valuable advice on tech career decisions and security best practices.

name: Shakshor Sarker
bio: Very close friend from the same school, known well from college through football. Programming Hero batch-3 graduate. We play football on Saturday evenings with Srishty and crew. Brainstorm, gossip and discuss deeply. Currently struggling with Flutter, Golang while working with Laravel (unsettled job). Affected by recent AI invasion. Discusses with Srishty about tech challenges.
